title: GCP Pub/Sub Publisher GetTopic + Publish (gRPC emulator)
description: Mocks google.pubsub.v1.Publisher over plaintext gRPC on Lyrebird's gRPC data plane. Set PUBSUB_EMULATOR_HOST=host:port so the Pub/Sub client dials Lyrebird plaintext with no auth. This recipe's mock answers GetTopic by echoing the requested topic (request field 1) back as Topic.name (response field 1), so a client's boot-time topic-exists check passes. Publish is a separate seed mock (see below) that returns a synthetic message id and OK — the publish path is not functionally exercised locally. Add this second mock to /config to accept publishes: match POST /google.pubsub.v1.Publisher/Publish, respond body {"f1":[{"string":"1"}]} (repeated message_ids field 1). The respond body is a Lyrebird gRPC response field-spec (fN -> value/copyFrom), not raw JSON.
